Diagrams · Reusable Asset Library

Diagrams Gallery

One pool of reusable diagrams shared by chapter test items. Linked items render the same image from the same Storage path — edit once, propagate everywhere. Chapter Test Item Bank · EASE Item Author.

—
Diagrams in pool
 
—
In use
 
—
Unlinked
 
— imported — HQ-authored 5 categories
Filter View

Edit diagram

PNG / JPG / WEBP, ≤5 MB. Filename is preserved (sanitised to lowercase + underscores).
Drives the Storage path on upload. Changing on an existing diagram does NOT move the binary — it relabels only.
Cambridge syllabus topics — drives gallery + picker filter.

Diagram

Delete diagram?

You are about to permanently delete this diagram from the reusable pool. Please confirm each consequence:

Type the phrase below exactly to continue:

DELETE DIAGRAM

Last chance. Deletion commits when you click the final button. Unlocks after a 3-second cooldown.
